title: Image Asset Requirements
description: Requirements for image creative assets. These define the technical constraints for image files.

min_width.description: Minimum width. Interpretation depends on unit (default: pixels). For exact dimensions, set min_width = max_width.

max_width.description: Maximum width. Interpretation depends on unit (default: pixels). For exact dimensions, set min_width = max_width.

min_height.description: Minimum height. Interpretation depends on unit (default: pixels). For exact dimensions, set min_height = max_height.

max_height.description: Maximum height. Interpretation depends on unit (default: pixels). For exact dimensions, set min_height = max_height.

unit.description: Unit of measurement for width/height values. Defaults to 'px' when absent. Print formats use 'inches' or 'cm'.

min_dpi.description: Minimum resolution in dots per inch. Always in DPI regardless of the dimension unit. Standard print requires 300 DPI, newspaper 150 DPI.

bleed.description: Required bleed area beyond the trim size. The submitted image must be larger than the declared dimensions: total width = trim width + left bleed + right bleed, total height = trim height + top bleed + bottom bleed. For uniform bleed: total = trim + (2 * uniform). Uses the same unit as the parent dimensions.

uniform.description: Same bleed on all four sides

color_space.description: Required color space. Print typically requires CMYK.

transparency_required.description: Whether the image must support transparency (requires PNG, WebP, or GIF)

animation_allowed.description: Whether animated images (GIF, animated WebP) are accepted

max_animation_duration_ms.description: Maximum animation duration in milliseconds (if animation_allowed is true)

max_weight_grams.description: Maximum weight in grams for the finished physical piece (print inserts, flyers). Affects postage calculations and production constraints. Only applicable to print channels.
